title: GitHub Actions Node24 Readiness Pack
currentWarningSummary: Node.js 20 deprecation warning detected in GitHub Actions. Migration to Node.js 24 required.

affectedActions.note: v4 uses Node.js 20 internally but is compatible with Node24 runners

readinessChecklist.item: Check node-version setting in each workflow
Verify local node --check passes with Node 24
Run npm run verify locally under Node 24
Confirm no deprecated Node.js 20 action warnings in CI
Confirm package.json engines field (if present) allows Node 24
Human reviews workflow diff before push

forbiddenActions: Edit .github/workflows files without explicit human YES
git push after workflow edit without human review
git tag after workflow edit without human review
Upgrade Node version in CI without running local verify first

migrationPlan.action: Confirm all tools pass node --check under Node 24 locally
Run npm run verify under Node 24 locally
Propose workflow diff: change node-version from "20" to "24"
こさめ/GPT PM reviews proposed diff
じゅんやさん issues YES, then edit .github/workflows/*.yml
git add / commit / push workflow change after explicit YES
Verify GitHub Actions CI passes with Node 24

rollbackPlan.beforeEdit: No changes made — nothing to roll back if dry-run only
rollbackPlan.afterPush: git revert <commit> requires explicit じゅんやさん YES
rollbackPlan.note: Workflow changes only affect CI; existing local tools remain unaffected

dangerousActionsDenied: destructive delete (rm -rf, git clean -f, git reset --hard)
recommendedNextAction: Node24 readiness checks passed. Proceed to step 4: draft workflow diff for human review. Do NOT edit .github/workflows without explicit じゅんやさん YES.
